_doc: Copy to primo-defaults.json (gitignored) and edit. Read at build time by
globalDefault: filtering level 0..3 applied to every site by default,
2 = optimal   (network + cosmetic for sites with broad host perms)
sites[]: per-site overrides. `hostname` may be a bare host or a full URL
(protocol/path are stripped). Subdomains inherit unless they have their
own entry. `level` is 0..3 (same scale as globalDefault). Each entry may
carry an optional `comment` field — ignored by the build.
Update semantics: on each install/update, our defaults are seeded into
user storage only where the user hasn't diverged from the previously-
seeded value. Sites removed from this list revert to globalDefault for
users who hadn't manually changed them.
